scripts.start:functions: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Push-Location app; npx func start --port 7071"
scripts.build: tsc && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json && npm run copy
scripts.copy: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force app/api | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force src/api/function.json app/api/; Copy-Item -Force host.json app/; $pkg = Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $appPkg = [ordered]@{ name = $pkg.name; version = $pkg.version; private = $true; main = 'api/index.js'; engines = $pkg.engines; dependencies = $pkg.dependencies }; $json = $appPkg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 50; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('app/package.json', $json, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false))); if (Test-Path package-lock.json) { Copy-Item -Force package-lock.json app/ }; if (Test-Path .npmrc) { Copy-Item -Force .npmrc app/ }"
